fields.helpText: The site name is a pointer to the institution file (#4).  Only one site may be entered into this file.

The VIST coordinator's name should be entered as you want it to look on the VIST Patient Record.  It should include any title or other information you wish to see as a part of the name.      For example: John Q Smith, Ph.D.

This field contains the telephone extension and/or routing symbol, whichever you prefer, that will be printed on the VIST Veteran Record directly under the name of the VIST coordinator.        If the field (ROUTING SYMBOL OR PHONE) contains X2598 then the following will print on the veteran record:        John Q Smith, Ph.D.      VIST Coordinator - X2598

When you enter VARO claims, you will be asked which regional office the claim was submitted to.  Enter the name of the regional office you use most often in this field and it will appear as the default whenever you enter VARO claims.
This field is used to enter the distribution list for transmitting the AMIS report to the program office.
